descriptionEn: Name means "servant" or "worshiper." He is the son of Boaz and Ruth and the father of Jesse and grandfather of David. Obed was an ancestor of Jesus Christ and is listed in Matthew and Luke's genealogies.

verses.line: And Salmon begat Boaz, and Boaz begat Obed,
And Salmon begat Booz of Rachab; and Booz begat Obed of Ruth; and Obed begat Jesse;
Which was the son of Jesse, which was the son of Obed, which was the son of Booz, which was the son of Salmon, which was the son of Naasson,
And Boaz begat Obed, and Obed begat Jesse,

images.caption: Pen and brown ink over pencil on paper picture of Ruth, Naomi, and Obed in 1860 by Simeon Solomon locatead at the Birmingham Museums and Art Gallery.
